_meta.description: BuildStream / remote-execution cache usage across both cache drives (ghost, exo-0)

rows.derivation: live /status endpoint (CurrSize / MaxSize) via kubectl API-server service proxy

(allocations_total - releases_total) * block_size, where block_size = 21474836480 bytes / 35 blocks (manifests/buildbarn-config.yaml); block-device-backed storage is fixed-size on disk, so this is an estimate of logical fill, not physical allocation
